plugin.name: Sapiens2
plugin.description: Meta Sapiens2 human-centric suite: pose, body-part segmentation, surface normals, 3D pointmap, human matting, and video motion capture (animated GLB).

env.description: Optional Hugging Face token; only needed when overriding SAM_3D_BODY_MODEL to the gated official repo
Max seconds to wait for a Modal call (video mocap can be slow)
